title: Spiced Flatbread with Cheese
description: A simple and flavorful flatbread recipe from India, topped with melted cheese and a blend of spices. Perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: Place the flatbread on a baking sheet.
Sprinkle the shredded cheese evenly over the flatbread.
Mix the peppery spice blend with a pinch of salt, and sprinkle over the cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a minute or two.
Cut into desired shapes or serve whole.
